## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation update (runbook, ADR, risk register, planning)
- [ ] Script / automation update
- [ ] New template or process document
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, incorrect info)

## Related issue

Closes #

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`docs/`, `planning/`, `scripts/`, `fix/`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] If ADR: all sections filled, status set, deciders listed
- [ ] If risk register: Last reviewed date updated, owner assigned
- [ ] If runbook: reviewed by at least one engineer who will use it
- [ ] All links tested and working
